title: 96Gb 6400mhz cl32 + 2tb NVME - G.Skill Trident Z + 990 PRO
description: Details Condition: New Brand: G.Skill Description No offers, not splitting. Hi Everyone, Up for sale is a 6400Mhz CL32 96Gb kit of G.Skill Tridents in Pearl White , along side a Samsung 2Tb 990pro NVME drive. If you are looking to build an ultra high-end rig , this will be at home paired with a 9800X3D and 5090 - Both of which you could afford with the savings from this auction compared to retail. Please see photos and let me know if any questions - If you are picking up, I'm happy to show both up and running first. Premium high-performance DDR5 memory - 6400Mhz at CL32 using Hynix M-Die IC. Samsung 990 Pro 2TB is a high-performance, internal PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD. It features blazing sequential speeds up to 7,450 MB/s, integrated hardware encryption, and a 5-year warranty, making it ideal for high-end gaming (including the PS5), 4K video editing, and heavy workloads Widely regarded as some of the best DDR5 chips available for tuning and overclocking, or exceptional performance we straight...
